Lesson Content

1 Welcome to Mibenglish Episode 1. Today we will learn about basic English greetings.
2 In this lesson, you will learn how to say hello, goodbye, and introduce yourself.
3 Let's start with the most common greeting. Hello is used when you meet someone.
4 Let's start with the most common greeting. Hello is used when you meet someone.
5 Good morning is used before noon.
6 Good afternoon is used after noon until evening.
7 Good evening is used after sunset.
